ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments associated with the user profile */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., author, editor, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_until" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose activity is being logged */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preference is stored */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the password reset */,
  "token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the token was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose data was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed data */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
